reviews.review_description: I would rate it a 5 star but there are some things that have made me put it down to a 4 star a couple reasons is that we need more updates, another reason is we need a multiplayer, third reason is we need more fields,maps, tractors, tools etc. I would also love some sort of freedom where we can go up to the tractor door handle and open it and climb into our tractors instead of getting teleported inside them. and when hooking up machinery on the back we need things like getting outside the cab to put the pto on and unfold the arms etc. overall this game is good and I love farming games but this game has given me disappointment and I have had this game for quite a while and still no updates. The main thing we need is updates that don’t take a full year to do. For me this game gets a 8/10 I like the concept but there is quite a bit of room for improvements. Thank you if u have read all this!
Best game i have ever play i like farming and its gud
I really like this game

This game is the best I love it. I played it today. I bought it today. It was so fun. I feel like I was on a brand new world where no one would go to a brand new world just me like a brand new world. I guess that’s all I got. Have a good day. See you later bye. ￼

Can’t find it kinda disappointing. But still awesome game.

Ok so this I am amazing game. But I really want silage and road and if u can gigets (sry u spell wrong but any way) pls add a Carlow ballinkillen map and also pls add more tractors like a class/massy/john deer.🙃
This game is super fun. It puts you in the life of a farmer, and it did help me learning more about farming￼

It is fun of the first few seconds but after that is just gets boring there is no free roam no trucks car or even more than one tractor, there are two vehicles in total and you can’t even drive the vehicles the the fields and the tutorial is confusing and hard to understand. Also you can’t make any money, so don’t make the mistake what I did and buy this game.  ￼ ￼
I get you can’t free roam but honestly as a farm sim player since 2018 it’s good for farming simulators first very game.

The game seems fun at first but once you start playing more it gets boring. There is no free roam, no trucks or cars and there are only two tractors. The selling thing is also boring I was hoping you could drive a semi truck and drive to a silo and manually sell your corn. 
This game is a mistake to buy don't waste your money on this game like I did.😡
(I don't know much about farming)

overall I am positively surprised by the game but the number of machines and fields is a bit overwhelming 3 days since I have this game and I have been playing it nothing has bored me and it is quite good so I do not understand what others expect from the first entry into the agricultural world in VR, I have a question about the developers whether there will be any updates adding machines/crops because it would be nice if it was constantly developed and improved

reviews.review_description: The game sucks and is boring! There is no free ￼roam, no cars or trucks, you teleport to every tractor instead of walking to it and there’s no way to end the tutorial. Don’t let the ￼video showing off the game fool you, it seriously sucks and I wish I could get my money back.
There are a few bugs and the graphics are not the best
Are there gonna be more updates and more things to do and open world ￼

reviews.review_title: Has potential but currently falls flat
reviews.review_description:
I so really want to pay the price but it should be A+ title for this price. 

I think some people do have, to high expectations coming from pc. However the experience falls incredibly short in comparison to other VR titles and what can be achieved in VR even costing less. 

I think they should have or now listen to the VR community if you want to make this amazing. This experience is missing  a story or real reason to keep playing it’s buggy and falls short of expectations Ifor a VR title.

 I  have 900 plus titles and a lot of games hours to back up my what i say here. I am stuck plowing a field that’s says 99.9 finished and can’t see the last .1 I ended up getting motion sickness after driving over and over to find the .1 in the end I just quit and uninstalled. You guys have the resources to do better and the obligation  for the title and community to fix this.
Developers if you can add driving to the fields and more tractors it would be much better so please add more tractors at least

This app is limited to what you can do. I believe this is essentially an awesome kickstarter. I love the hands on style maintenance that was put into the game. I believe there should be some upgrades or tweaks. I would like to see the same speed of time adjustments in the console and pc games. Free roam and trucks to drive to sell points or silos would be great. Animals would make a cool feature as well. The console games have more power and allow for all we have come to enjoy and you should remember the computing power is not equal to Xbox, pc, or PlayStation. 

This is fun for a few minutes at a time not all day marathons.

For years people have been asking for VR implementation (even just basic head tracking) on the PC game, and you would not do it through lack of demand, then you do this instead.
No free roam, not even walk through fields.
No spraying or fertiliser.
No attachments like hooking up the comb on the combine or plough to tractor.
No carting grain.
Harvester grain tank does not appear to even fill up.
Tractor turning angle is pathetic. Should not take up 3/4 of a field to turn on full lock.
Harvester engine should not change rpm depending on speed.
Have the devs ever had anything to do with farming or even the farm sim series before?

developer_response.body: We understand your frustration and appreciate your detailed feedback. Farming Simulator VR is a different experience from the main series, and we recognize that some core farming mechanics are missing. Player input is essential as we continue improving the game, and we’re taking feedback like yours into account for future updates. Thanks for sharing your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: Hey this game is okay but i think it needs more like more machines,upgrades to the greenhouse to make more room for more plants and make it look nice and more plants that you can grow on  different beds,etc
Man it was fun for while but want me money back.

Love farming simulator but this was just thrown together man. You have to teleport to each zone, no free roam at all. Selling resources is automatic and no economy. Very small amount of machines. No trucks or anything, no hauling supplies. Controls are kinda janky. I'm refunding this, I'll buy it again when you make a proper game. I get VR is new and you think you can make a half butt game and it'll sell since there's not that many games on the market but come on, try harder then this.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, we are always working on improving our games and adding new features to it.

reviews.review_description: Maybe I’m just an idiot. That’s highly possible. However, there is no way to skip or end the tutorial. The voice over for the tutorial is so patronizing and obnoxious, and there doesn’t seem to be a way to ever finish it. There is no main menu, and there’s no option to start a game without the tutorial. There is an option to turn off the voice over, however, upon doing that, the main features of the game break, and you STILL get the obnoxious tutorials, just without the voice over. Please just let me play the game without an AI robot voice “hyping” me up.

Sorry giant team but very disappointed with this game. Like play a demo version. No freedom to drive machines, no economy, lack of setting. Even doors not opening but handles interactive. I now many says the workshop is fun but farming simulator isn't mechanic simulator. 22 EUR not worth it and not recommend to buy. I think giants made mistake with stand alone VR game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We’re sorry FS VR didn’t meet your expectations and appreciate your input for future improvements.

reviews.review_description: As a big fan of farming simulator I've been waiting for this day to come and giants. You guys delivered looking forward to the updates. As it comes on, I noticed little bit of glitchiness to it, but I'm sure you guys will figure that out as time goes on other than that, absolutely love the game.
You need more vehicle

I'm absolutely disappointed. I was super excited for the game to come out. Only to do EVERYTHING that can be done in the game in a matter of a couple of hours. Definitely NOT worth paying hard earned money for in my opinion. In all.......ITS A VERY DISAPPOINTING MESS OF A GAME.

reviews.review_title: Overall great start and much improved
reviews.review_description:
After I wrote my first review, there have been lots of improvements all across the game, so all five stars. 

While not like the PC version, this has those quick elements that make me come back to the VR version to get my farming fix more often.  

All and all, a great game.
God awful it's fun at the start but more you play it more it gets more boring

So, this game needs improvement... 

The green house farming is nice 5/5
Farming is ok... 3/5
Mechanic is pretty cool. 4/5 
Freedom 0/5

This game needs to have more freedom like the console games where you can buy fields and retrieve your equipment from the shop. 

Also, you can't get in and out of the vehicles freely and you can't manually connect your machines together. 

There is also no building so you can't just go park your vehicles in a shed however you want and there is no animals that you have to feed and take care of.

This is why farming simulator is such a popular game. 

Side note 📝:
Imagine harvesting your field with your pipe out and your friend is in a tractor connected to a trailer and you can see each other waving. Multiplayer would be awesome. 

Edit: this game is ok. I will still probably play it but this could be better. 👍

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your detailed feedback! We’re glad you enjoy aspects like greenhouse farming and mechanics but understand your concerns about freedom and missing features. Farming Simulator VR is a different experience from the main series, but we appreciate feedback like yours to help improve the game.

Multiplayer and more freedom are highly requested, and we’re taking all player input into account for future updates. Thanks for sharing your thoughts—we hope upcoming improvements will make the game even better for you!

reviews.review_title: Not bad game but i don’t love it either
reviews.review_description:
I have been a long time fan of the farming franchise, for years i have been waiting for something similar like this but it wasn’t what i expected it to be, Harvesting and cultivating is boring which is understandable sitting in the driver seat for so long, the main problem for ME is the lack of freedom what i mean is i cannot park my tractor where i want and i can only drive my vehicles on the field. The features that carried my attention and what i thought was most entertaining is fixing my vehicles and planting in the greenhouse, overall i don’t think the game is any bad in any way but the lack of content and things to do can lead to the game getting extremely boring really quickly. I hope that the developers can keep working on this game to improve enjoyability and keep adding new more features and content. 

Long story short: The game isn’t bad but it’s missing alot of stuff and it gets boring really quickly

Toodles!

Iv been playing giants games since the first farm sim and I would have to say I think this is worse than that one im trying to figure out how to get a refund at this time I had high hopes for this game and it had let me down and it’s kinda of a disappointment to the farming community
Wtf is that thats not farming simulator it’s  an indi game!!!! This should be free!!!!🤬🤬🤬

Huge fan of the game but it gets a little boring, you have a small selection of stuff you can buy, and only three plots of land. I do love how we get to fix the tires and stuff but in the future please add more stuff into the game that would make it more fun. Either way it's a very fun game and I hope they add more stuff in the future

reviews.review_title: Disappointing, but I still have hope
reviews.review_description:
I remain convinced that a VR version (visual only) of FS 25 would have had a very positive impact on the main series.
Nevertheless, this standalone VR version seemed interesting on paper, but isn't in game for a whole host of reasons already mentioned in the other comments.

There are some very good things, like the high-pressure cleaner and the mechanics, but there are also some major frustrations that put me off continuing.

A short list of the most frustrating points for me:

-The reversing speed is far too low, and the steering bugs when you take the wheel of the tractor. 
-I sometimes have a lack of fluidity with my quest3 in the fields, which makes the experience not very pleasant.
-I have trouble with the interaction of the ignition keys.
-My sitting position in certain vehicles (Kubota) is not good, slightly too high and the steering wheel too far away.

All in all, even if it doesn't make it the best VR experience, correcting these few points would make me want to recommend it, but as it is, I wouldn't even allow it as a gift, unfortunately.

I'm still giving it a 4 because Giants has taken an interest in VR, and I think that's a very good thing.

Edit: For the benefit of developers, could you increase the height of real headers when working in the field? Please.

It’s very good for their first crack at VR it’s a lot of fun and more immersive then the normal games. But if you’ve played any of the recent sims don’t expect it to be the same it’s a lot like 2015 farm sim currently but I’m sure as time goes on it will grow much closer to the newer ones

Where should i start... 
There are a lot of things that make you think on what were they thinking while making this game. I guess they made the map system on the tablet and separate location because having an open world will be problematic on the performance that is already a bit low since you can also experience a lot of artefacts during gameplay and a quite pixelated game. I haven't  seen any graphics options in the menu, so there's nothing you can tweak. I guess it's one way to do it, Ok! 
The areas are so d. dark that that you almost can't do anything unless its daylight, what's  the point of having lamps in the greenhouse if it's dimmed up to the point they look like the anoying leds on your router. That's  how much light you get at night in the greenhouse. The lights on your vehicles you remember from the PC games like FS19, FS22 , FS25,etc, they are nonexistent, its like a bubble around your tractor or combine that is a bit lit up, but your cabin is definitely lit up👌🏼. 
Problems with the tracking the distance at which your hand acts i huge, imagine trying to pick a strawbery in front of you and you grab the basket that is more than a half of meter to the left on your left hand, and wind up throwing all things out of the basket on the floor. The remote pickup is a nice thing, but it's going to be annoying.
 Lack of content altogether! You lack automation like sprinklers that you could set up to automatically water your plants, but i guess this is in the next paid DLC among other stuff they might plan to release, like the space behind the greenhouse looks like it's  in the works to get upgrades and extend it. 
You can not enter an area where you set up a worker to do the chores just to check how they are doing it, you just see a loading bar on the tab! 
I hope they will bring in mods, but maybe it's  just me dreaming of the impossible!
This "Game" is very limited to fixed things in limited spaces, and not the open world you were hoping for, the vr playground you will lose yourself for hours and hours!
There is no challenge with the game, as i managed to get over 3 million in a couple hours of playing, and the game is repetitive. Unless you are a freak and a fanboy that does not care about this, you will get bored really fast! 
In my opinion, people should wait until this becomes the proper VR farming simulator it should be cause it's not worth the 25 usd it's currently listed! It's  missing a lot of important quality of life improvements like the most important thing... a FULL BODY!
DON'T WASTE your money just yet!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, we are always working on adding new features or improving our game, but we appreciate your honest feedback.

reviews.review_title: Great! But needs more info for beginners
reviews.review_description:
So I am new to Farming Simulator I've never played the PC version or any Farming Simulator before. But it sounded like an interesting and educational game to learn. 

 The tutorial was great I loved learning how to use the Harvester, power washing was cool and even repairing some vehicles. But once you pass the tutorial it doesn't tell you what to do. Like for instance it told me you bales to pick up but being new to Farming idk what a bale even is😂 

 After watching a few videos on YouTube I figured out that you have to buy an attachment for your tractor to pick up the bales. Also I didn't know what a cultivator is or that you have to buy one for your tractor. So it's a great game but I would advise more instructions for beginners. 

But other than that the game is awesome so far can't wait to learn more about farming, and can't wait to see what the devs  have in store for future updates! Great Buy!

reviews.review_title: It's not what I expected or hoped for
reviews.review_description:
As someone who has enjoyed Farming Simulator 22 and 25 in VR using VorpX, I initially approached this standalone VR title with high expectations.

The first hour of gameplay was admittedly disappointing, as the game's scope and complexity are significantly reduced compared to its PC counterparts. However, after adjusting expectations and watching others play, I've come to appreciate the game's distinct approach:

1. Slower-paced gameplay: The VR version emphasizes a more relaxed, bite-sized experience.
2. Focused activities: Each section of the game offers unique tasks that require time and attention.
3. Immersive interactions: Players can perform hands-on activities like machine maintenance, repairs, and power washing.

While it lacks the depth and variety of the PC versions, Farming Simulator VR has grown on me. I now find myself enjoying hour-long sessions every few days. The game shines in its immersive qualities, allowing players to operate machinery from detailed cabin interiors and engage in greenhouse farming with hand-picked crops.

It's important to approach Farming Simulator VR as a separate entity from the main series. While it may not satisfy all fans of the PC games, it represents a commendable effort by Giants Software to expand into the VR market. For those seeking a more casual, hands-on farming experience in virtual reality, this title offers a unique and gradually rewarding gameplay loop.

As the VR gaming landscape continues to evolve, there's still hope for official VR support for the PC versions of Farming Simulator in the future.

Of course fs vr isn’t going to look like fs 25.The farming simulator series has ONLY been released on consoles and pc with is 2D   Its a completely different story for a 3D game it will get better over time.Personally I think they have done a good job with how the games has turned out and very happy we finally have a vr farming game.

reviews.review_title: Wish it was like the other farming sims
reviews.review_description: I was excited to play but upon playing it wasn’t as good as I thought, I wish it had been like the other farming simulators with the free roam and having a place where you could walk to the shop to get the thing you bought, I do like the implication of having to fix your equipment but that doesn’t make up for how the game isn’t as good as I thought, like even as small as the loading screen it just looks like an ai generated image. I feel that this game could have been like all the other console farming sims with head and hand tracking. But doesn’t seem to be the case, this game could be so much more. Definitely seems to just been thrown together.

reviews.review_title: I wanted to like it, but just tedious
reviews.review_description:
TLDR: An unpolished mess of a boring and tedious game that you shouldn't waste your money or time.

I was trying to be generous about the whole thing. This is from the same people that make Farming Simulator so I figured they'd be the best at doing something like this. Well, I was right and wrong. I tried the other "Farm Sim VR" games and they are worse than this, but this isn't that much better. 

I'll go through each part of the game here:

Yard = Pressure Washer simulator. And a bad version at that. You can pressure wash your equipment after using it but it's just tedious and you have to be extra precise to get everything. They don't even let you buy a ladder or something to clean the top of the equipment. So if you can't teleport up there, it's not getting cleaned AND there are things you can't teleport to

Greenhouse = Watering simulator/Watching grass grow simulator. That's really all you do. Just water the plants. You can buy a hose attachment but that's it. Plus the plants don't grow if you don't stay in there and WATCH them grow. When they do finally grow you can harvest them and then sell them ... but that's it. Yeah you have to pick weeds every once in a while. Not fun, just tedious

Garage = Mechanic Simulator. This part is actually okay. It's got a good mix of things to do and it's not too boring. Yes it's a part of farming... but the part you wanted?

Field = Frustration Simulator. This is the worst part. For a game called farming simulator where they have a big combine on the front, you'd be able to use it. Well the controls are TERRIBLE! They don't track your hands well and the wheel will sometimes just flip over to the other side. Steering wheels don't do that! Plus if you do anything other than the harvest, you can't finish. Other than the harvesting.  The progress sticks at 99.99%. You can't use your mirrors to see behind you so you have to keep looking back. Plus the mirrors don't update the field as you cultivate or seed or whatever to it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We understand your concerns and appreciate your insights. Farming Simulator VR aims for realism, but we recognize areas for improvement and will continue refining the experience.

reviews.review_description: I was a little skeptical at the start but once I gave it a chance it became a great relaxing experience to just chill and farm.  Once you unlock more equipment and land the game opens up and gets quite addictive in a good way.

I know a lot of us are coming from years of FS or even FS25. This isn’t that sim this is a new sim for VR and it’s fantastic. There’s no point to compare it. 

I’m enjoying it and it’s quite something to be finally in and near my farm equipment. The driving is a little odd so I suggest driving with the joysticks as they respond better vs using the actually wheel. 

My only major feedback is the hand controls seems to be a bit touchy, if that’s the right word. I find myself hitting buttons that are close together too often on the drivable equipment. !

Must purchased or the meta quest

reviews.review_title: A little clunky but it's Farming Sim
reviews.review_description: I have a bit of experience with the PC version so I was already pretty familiar with the sim. Directions are not great, controls are wonky like the steering wheel lock at extreme left/right will stop but then your hand keeps going and the steering reverses. Throttle for each tractor is a bit wonky. Economy is just crazy, I got like $900 for 12 tomatoes lol! But it's great to run that combine and actually being in it. Very good, be patient if you hit some clunkiness.

reviews.review_title: Hit the target but just off.
reviews.review_description:
You can tell they have put a lot of resources to make the gameplay as smooth as possible. Any comments on graphics and content can be dismissed as it’s a Quest VR title. It’s in VR common, it’s awesome the fact that we have this title and thanks to the developers for delivering. However after spending some time playing the first week of release, this needs an update very soon.

- Tractor steering has a glitch which resets the tires at full turn.
- lighting could be a bit better day and night brighter or brightness option.
- Option to get in and out while at the field would be nice
- Option to snap turn in the tractor for seated mode so you can look back easily 
- Washing is nice but it’s missing something…. Not sure what… could be to have the option to use like soap… for faster cleaning sometimes it’s a bit slow…

Great game definitely recommend a buy, however at this price the devs have the responsibility to update this game until it has absolutely not issues, is running smooth and adding some request from the gaming community.

You can tell they put a lot of thought into making it look real but it’s hard to play. Hands seem clunky and bash into things and driving controls just aren’t great. I loved the phone game but for some reason just didn’t have fun playing this VR version.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We’re sorry FS VR didn’t meet your expectations and appreciate your input for future improvements.

reviews.review_description: Great game but it gets boring way to fast. It’s very repetitive. Also the game glitches and makes me wash the equipment twice. The most boring part is washing the equipment. There needs to be more to do like a free roam would be cool and more equipment needs added.

developer_response.body: Glad you like the game but understand your concerns about repetition and glitches. We're working on updates to improve variety and fix issues like the double washing. Your feedback on free roam and more equipment is appreciated—stay tuned for future improvements!

reviews.review_title: Tried it, didn't work like a farming sim
reviews.review_description: Didn't meet expectations whatsoever, then was eligible for a refund just to see that it wasn't approved

So I’m a HUGE fan of FS and when I saw this was coming to VR I was beyond hyped preorder and got extremely excited when it came even waited till 1pm to play.. 
 
3 things I know the that the graphics aren’t going to be super duper great because of the fact is standalone which I’m actually fine with but….
1. There should be way more seeds and stuff to plant like wheat and Soybeans I just wished it was more because the game can get repetitive at some point
2. I’m not saying it should be opened world but at the very least we should be able to get out the trucks and see the field that was disappointing because I feel like that’s a huge part of the game also taking are harvest to the grain mill or whatever if it’s a small area that we could drive too would make this game a lot better than its competitor
3. More machines man I was sad that we only get a number of machines that’s sad I honestly think if we you could implement those things you would have a great game. And you can’t report bugs on your website for VR and do you plan on updating this game at any time or is it just here ya go no updates.
I do like it as you can freely walk but I wish that you could just press x to steer as when you turn it let's go of the steering wheel and also causes discomfort holding the button in all the time.

Trust me if you thinking of getting it don’t it sucks no free roam not even able to walk in fields no spraying feels terrible glitchy, and it overall just sucks filling up your gas tank feels like a workout when you go to grab something half the time it falls out of your hand changing tires constantly. Oh my God where do I start the machines break all the time I get maintenance and stuff but every time you plow a field or harvest something breaks overall experience is terrible. Try to refund it sadly got declined. Wish I never bought this game. You’re better off just getting the normal version.Devs really  need to up their game. ￼ and the seat height is terrible if you have short arms like me, you can’t reach the wheel I get it’s in its early stages but off the start we need more diversity in vehicle selection ￼

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback on Farming Simulator VR. We’re sorry it didn’t meet your expectations. The game is still evolving, and player input helps us improve. We’re working on refining mechanics, fixing glitches, and expanding vehicle options. If you’re experiencing technical issues, updating to the latest version may help. We appreciate you giving it a try!

reviews.review_description: As a farmer and virtual farm I absolutely love the new game! I enjoy being able to work on my equipment and controlling it making me feel like I’m really in the seat. However, I kinda with the map was bigger and I had more free roam. Keeping the quests limited capabilities compared to that of a pc and gaming consoles like Xbox series x I understand it cannot do the same but I’d love to see more updates and maybe some expansions in the future! Maybe even the ability to open the doors of the cabs for some more added depth and detail. Keep improving the game and what an absolute masterpiece it is!!

Absolutely loved the console version. So far this one seems to be good but it has froze 2 times now. The 2nd time completely froze up the oculus. But plenty of time for improvement. Please include a multi-player as well

Absolutely love this game!! It’s so cool!! Learned real quick that you don’t have to run combine at full throttle as it is harder to control. Half throttle is perfect 😃😃. So impressed with this game!!

I have played more than 4000 hours in all Farming simulators. Great game to relax. Keep improving the game, there is great potential for customization and monetization of content :) And even this will be useful if it all grows into VR for PC

I have to admit that this game stands out amongst other games for Quest. I can't really think of any other game that I enjoyed in VR in general. For me the most enjoyable part is the servicing part of the game as I like to toy with all the tools and the nicely soothing game play of the greenhouse when I like to harvest the fruits and sometimes just mess around. I can't really enjoy the field activities, probably because I get dizzy when driving :) and yeah sure... of course, I'd like if I could select from tens of dozens of different vehicles or other plants as well, but I see it as great start and if there will be more updates with more stuff to do, I'm all in.

Too many people are going in with the expectation of this being like farming simulator 25 or even 22 but it’s its own game and it’s amazing at what it’s doing. There is a limit to how much free roaming you’ll get with any VR game but this is perfect at what it’s made for.

At first I pre-ordered it, it didn't work I refunded the purchase then bought it for the full price that was the only downside but the part that sucked you couldn't use the blue hose in the greenhouse  but overall a 4.5/5

I think this game could to way better if their was a mod hub,bigger map,able to enter and exit vehicles and more vehicles and implements. I would love to see stuff like that in game but overall really good game with the stuff it already has

This game is not too bad. Games that just release are bad at first but then they start to get better the thing I like the most is the green house it’s the best also can you guys please add more seeds like corn, cucumber, and a lot more seeds please!

FS VR was designed as a standalone title and was not intended to replicate PC and Console FS games which have grown in terms of complexity and detail over the years. It's unfair and unhelpful therefore to compare FS VR to those larger titles. 
With that out of the way FS VR succeeds in its own ambition to deliver a good FS style simulator within the confines of the VR hardware.
Graphics are good enough to enjoy an immersive experience with sufficient realism. Detail within the cabin of the machines that you drive is good and it delivers a convincing experience of using those machines to plough, cultivate, seed, harvest and bale crops that you've sewn.
The wider landscapes are decent enough to provide a pleasing backdrop to your farm. 
In terms of wider gameplay, once you've tended to the fields you can sell produce, use earned cash to buy better equipment and tools, grow smaller crops in your greenhouse, powerwash your machines and service or repair them in the workshop when they break.  All that adds some nice variety to the gameplay, but at the moment there is no ability to drive your tractor and trailer full of crops from the farm to the wholesaler, you simply unload it on the farm and it sells at that point. I'm okay with that.
The menu system of using a tablet to make all selections and purchases in the game works very well and suits VR perfectly. 
Control mechanics are generally very good. Driving machinery is enjoyable although in other tasks it can be a little too easy for tools and the pressure washer lance to get knocked out of your hand on a regular basis.
If the developers are listening, I'd love to see an early update which includes a few additional crops to sew, some economic fluctuations which might influence which crops players want to plant and some additional machinery to buy as the current list is fairly sparse. The utopia would be the addition of some basic animal husbandry such as poultry, pigs or cattle to complete the 'farming light' experience. That would greatly enhance longevity of the game.
Beyond that my only ask would be for the developers to assist players who are new to FS by adding a very brief description in the shop of what each machine is intended to do. For example, you can buy a 'Header'. It wouldn't take a lot for the developers to add a sentence to inform new-comers what a header is used for.
Overall FS VR is a very good, very relaxing and enjoyable experience and a welcome addition to the FS franchise.
This game is garbage nothing about it is fun nor worth what was paid for it
Great game wish here was more too it like different machines being able to sowand harvest potatoes and things alike

Dear giants I applaud you have delivered on what lawn mower simulator couldn't a game I can switch my brain off too may I make suggestion for a update moo cows and plenty of them with some piggies too

reviews.review_title: For the first version its OK
reviews.review_description: I am a big fan of the Fs series especially on PC with mods and I preorder farming simulator VR on the first day of announcement. FS VR first attempt version 1 its ok for me i love the vr experience to drive a tractor or combine in vr the game its not perfect but for me its acceptable. I hope the game to be successful and to have more updates in the future like open world more jobs, more machinery and more to do in the game. Thank you for all the Farming games i play every single day specially on pc i wish you all the best with Fs VR in the future

The game overall is good, obviously being new release there is bugs, glitches and slight lags. However the game I haven’t experienced too much, only minor glitches. There isn’t much to the game just yet but sure with a Few updates It’ll be much better. Just definitely need more things to do in it. There isn’t as much freedom as any other FS games but it’s vr. As long as GIANTS keep updating the game it will defiantly be good.

reviews.review_title: I agree with DariusSmitas and VR ant VR.
reviews.review_description: I agree with DariusSmitas its disappointing I was expecting a lot more freedom. This can't really be called a simulator because in simulators you have a lot more freedom in this you just chose places you want to visit. Kinda like how you do in vacation simulator even that game has more freedom than this. You don't even get freedom harvesting because you play in a boxed area. Car mechanic simulator has more freedom than this to bad its too late to get refunded now. I just have to deal with this until you stop updating this game and abandon this hot put together piece of trash. We'll be lucky if you last a year updating this. I feel like a beginner coder could build this game with more freedom and semi trucks and everything that is in farming simulator. You used that name to deceive people to get more money but we all have the same ending are you happy with your actions before you get judged by God?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.

We understand that Farming Simulator VR may not have met your expectations. The VR version offers a different experience tailored to the platform, and it is still in active development. We appreciate your input and are committed to improving the game with future updates.

reviews.review_description:
To be fair, it is quite good quest game. At the same time it is worst FS I have played.
I'm fan of FS game since 2015. I've been so excited to see it is finally getting vr. Now I feel like a kid who got for christmass wooden blocks inside ps5 box.

reviews.review_title: I like this developer's games, but
reviews.review_description: I like this developer's games, but this product is terrible. Some mechanics simply don’t work, and it feels like the game was made by an amateur. There are inconsistencies with the main series and the logic of how farming machines operate. There’s no freedom or economy. It’s just awful! 😱

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.

We're sorry to hear that Farming Simulator VR didn’t meet your expectations. The game is designed as a distinct VR experience and is still being developed further. Your input is noted and will help guide future improvements.

reviews.review_title: Best vr farming game by far
reviews.review_description:
I’ve been waiting months for this game to come out all the work giants have put into I have to say they have done a very great job I do hope you guys update the game sometimes because it would get boring.
In the future you should add more things ito and add more equipment and should extend the map and please please please add a multiplayer I know it’s a lot to do but it would be good to have a laugh with your friends thank you GIANTS
Great game! Wish it was open world and they had more machines. But hopefully they will add more in future updates. Looking forward to the future of FSVR!
